rawIntent: Add a padStart utility under src/shared/utils/pad-start that left-pads a string to a target length

successCriteria.description: The padStart utility correctly left-pads a string to the specified target length.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Changes to existing utilities outside of the padStart function.
Modifications to the file structure beyond the specified path.
